tasks.title: Remove hardcoded Gemini API key from client
tasks.description: Eignamat: js/gemini.js contains a hardcoded Google API key; move all Gemini calls server-side (Cloud Functions or Netlify function) and rotate the key.

tasks.title: Rotate compromised Gemini API key
tasks.description: After moving Gemini server-side, revoke/rotate the exposed key and set up env-based secret management.

tasks.title: Implement per-user/IP quota + abuse prevention for AI endpoints
tasks.description: Add rate limiting, logging, and basic anti-abuse controls to the server-side Gemini proxy.

tasks.title: Unify vision detections schema (valuation + IRIS)
tasks.description: Eignamat: align prompts/output schema so VISION_SYSTEM_PROMPT and valuation_engine expectations match; avoid fragmented detection outputs.

tasks.title: Fix prompt mismatch: update feature list + contract
tasks.description: Eignamat: prompt text still references a smaller feature set; update prompt + mapping so engine sees all expected detections.

tasks.title: Build Condition Score (0-100) + grade from detections
tasks.description: Eignamat Phase 2: compute explainable Condition Score with confidence thresholds, evidence strings, and conservative rules for negative claims.

tasks.title: Add 'What the AI saw' UI section
tasks.description: Show detected features/issues with confidence + evidence, plus a 'Needs verification' bucket for low-confidence detections.

tasks.title: Implement PDF report generation (short + full)
tasks.description: Eignamat: generate branded PDF with valuation waterfall, key drivers, confidence, disclaimers; optionally include photo appendix.

tasks.title: Choose PDF rendering approach and prototype
tasks.description: Decide client-side (jsPDF/html2canvas) vs server-side (Cloud Function + headless Chromium) and build a working prototype.

tasks.title: Create calibration dataset import (CSV) for multipliers
tasks.description: Eignamat: add tooling to import comparable sales/transactions and compute multipliers by postcode/type/size/year bands.

tasks.title: Build accuracy test harness (MAPE, bias by segment)
tasks.description: Eignamat: define a 50–100 property test set and compute metrics (MAPE/median abs error/overvaluation rate).

tasks.title: Add B2B landing split (consumer vs broker vs investor)
tasks.description: Eignamat Phase 2: create segmented landing pages with tailored copy and CTAs.

tasks.title: Implement lead magnet: free Condition Snapshot PDF (email gated)
tasks.description: Capture email before generating a shareable short PDF; store lead metadata.

tasks.title: Create onboarding email sequence and wire to provider
tasks.description: Eignamat: review /content/email-sequence.md and implement in an email provider (loops, postmark, etc.).

tasks.title: Run valuation v2.1 regression tests on sample properties
tasks.description: Re-run Hlíðargerði 17, Mjóahlíð 12, Skúlagata 46; log new vs old results and note drivers.

tasks.title: Define Firebase data contract (public vs private user data)
tasks.description: TakkArena: document collections and which fields are public vs PII; split into users_public/users_private or equivalent.

tasks.title: Align identity mapping (uid ↔ staffId)
tasks.description: TakkArena: make user identity deterministic (prefer uid-first) so Firestore rules can enforce ownership.

tasks.title: Rewrite Firestore security rules to least-privilege
tasks.description: TakkArena: update firestore.rules to match the real data model and cover all collections used in code.

tasks.title: Remove PII exposure: restrict users collection reads
tasks.description: TakkArena: app currently subscribes to all users and stores email/kennitala; ensure regular users cannot read PII.

tasks.title: Add missing rules for collections used by app
tasks.description: TakkArena: add rules for projects, challenges, nudges, performance_snapshots, user_achievements, personal_bests, users/*/drafts, etc.

tasks.title: Harden MyTimePlan Netlify proxy (auth + rate limit)
tasks.description: mytimeplan-proxy is unauthenticated and accepts raw kennitala with Access-Control-Allow-Origin:*; require Firebase ID token, verify server-side, restrict origin, add rate limiting/audit.

tasks.title: Stop sending kennitala from client
tasks.description: TakkArena: fetch kennitala server-side from users_private after auth check; remove from browser payloads.

tasks.title: Add Firebase Emulator + rules unit tests
tasks.description: TakkArena: add @firebase/rules-unit-testing tests to prevent security regressions; wire into CI if desired.

tasks.title: Fix CompetitionsPage userCoins placeholder
tasks.description: TakkArena: components/Competitions/CompetitionsPage.tsx passes userCoins={0}; wire real user coin balance.

tasks.title: Decide whether to keep 'cats theme' TODO or remove
tasks.description: TakkArena: Competitions.tsx sets activeTheme('cats') with a TODO; either implement full theme plumbing or delete.

tasks.title: Build Betrithu frontend (store UI)
tasks.description: Next.js app: complete the customer-facing pages (home, browse, product page, checkout success/cancel, library).

tasks.title: Confirm Stripe fallback checkout works end-to-end
tasks.description: Betrithu: /api/checkout currently creates Stripe session; validate webhooks update orders and grant library access.

tasks.title: Build audio player UI (web)
tasks.description: Betrithu: create a clean, mobile-friendly audio player for purchased recordings (progress, resume, speed, sleep timer).

tasks.title: Create product page design system
tasks.description: Betrithu: design product detail layout (benefits, preview, testimonials, pricing, trust badges).

tasks.title: Set up staging deploy + smoke tests
tasks.description: Deploy firebase-refactor branch to staging; test streaming, checkout, orders, admin flows.
